title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Atos India Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Atos India Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Frontend Developer looking for your next big career move? Atos India Advisory Limited in Pune offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Atos India Advisory Limited:
Atos India Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Atos India Advisory Limited!
